import logging
import json

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
tracer = None

def process_event(event):
    result = handle(event)
    if logger.isEnabledFor(logging.DEBUG):
        logger.debug("Event payload: %s", json.dumps(event["payload"]))
    if tracer:
        with tracer.start_span("process") as span:
            if span.is_recording():
                span.set_attribute("payload", json.dumps(event["payload"]))
    return result

def handle(event):
    return {"status": "processed", "id": event["id"]}
